name: Capsicum with Anchovies
method: Serves 6 3 firm red capsicums (peppers) 1 firm yellow capsicum (pepper) 2–3 cloves garlic fresh basil 15 anchovies good-quality virgin olive oil, for drizzling

In a serving dish arrange a layer of capsicum then some chopped garlic, basil and some anchovy fillets. Continue layering until everything is used up. Now drizzle over some olive oil and let stand for a few hours before serving.
